title: Impressum
summary: German-language Impressum (§5 DDG legal notice) source-of-truth copy for Anchor's /impressum route, with operator, VAT, insurance, DSA, and dispute-resolution details.
scope: Rudolpho AI / Marco Rudolph operator data
notes: Prose/content legal source-of-truth copy (not a decision, requirement set, or technical contract). Frontmatter explicitly frames it as page copy to convert into page.tsx, satisfying CR-001/CR-003 from compliance-requirements; references ADR-0021 but is itself documentation, so DOC. Filename suffix is a stable path-unique token, not a SHA-256 hash, because no code-execution tool was available in this environment to compute one; slug 'impressum' is globally unique in the tree so there is no sibling collision.
